summary: A Claude connector called Vibe Prospecting turns Claude chats into a lead generation system, pulling from 50+ data sources with 800M+ verified professional profiles to build targeted B2B lists instantly without needing separate CRM tools.
key_insights: We could create our own Claude connector for local service lead generation - integrate with our existing n8n workflows to pull HVAC, plumber, roofing contractor data directly through Claude conversations
Apply the 'comment to get access' strategy on our social posts - use 'Comment LEADS' or 'Comment SETUP' to capture engagement and funnel prospects into our automated follow-up sequences
We could position our AI chatbot service as turning their website 'into a full prospecting workspace' - reframe from just lead capture to active lead generation system
Apply the instant structured output approach - show prospects exactly what they'll get (emails, phone numbers, company data) rather than vague promises about 'more leads'
We could create a local service version: 'Just type Find me 50 Dallas HVAC contractors and it returns structured lists instantly' - adapt for our target market
Use the 'verified contact info' angle heavily - emphasize our lead quality and verification process to differentiate from cheap lead lists
swipe_phrases: You can now use [our system] to generate leads for your business [website]
Turns your [website/chatbot] into a full prospecting workspace [ad]
Returns a structured list with emails, phone numbers and company data instantly [ad]
Verified contact info from 50+ data sources [website]
Your lead generation system is on us [website]
Comment SETUP and we'll send you the link [social]
Find me 50 local contractors using AI [outreach]
Pulls data from verified professional profiles [email]
